mapper.select: SELECT asset_type AS assetType, CASE asset_type WHEN 1 THEN '股票' WHEN 2 THEN '基金' WHEN 3 THEN '债券' WHEN 4 THEN '其他' ELSE '未知' END AS assetTypeName, COUNT(DISTINCT asset_code) AS assetCount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN transaction_type = 1 THEN amount + fee + tax WHEN transaction_type = 2 THEN -(amount - fee - tax) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalAmount FROM position_record WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY asset_type ORDER BY asset_type
SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN transaction_type = 1 THEN amount + fee + tax WHEN transaction_type = 2 THEN -(amount - fee - tax) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalAmount FROM position_record WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT asset_code) FROM position_record WHERE status = 1

SELECT asset_code AS assetCode, MAX(asset_name) AS assetName, asset_type AS assetType, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN transaction_type = 1 THEN amount + fee + tax WHEN transaction_type = 2 THEN -(amount - fee - tax) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalAmount, MAX(current_quantity) AS currentQuantity FROM position_record WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY asset_code, asset_type ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT asset_code AS assetCode, MAX(asset_name) AS assetName, asset_type AS assetType, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN transaction_type = 1 THEN amount + fee + tax WHEN transaction_type = 2 THEN -(amount - fee + tax) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalAmount, MAX(current_quantity) AS currentQuantity FROM position_record WHERE status = 1 AND asset_type = #{assetType} GROUP BY asset_code, asset_type ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
